info.description: ✨Reverse-engineered API for Gemini web app. It can be used as a genuine API key from OpenAI, Gemini, and Claude.
info.title: Gemini Web To API

get.description: Returns the status and metrics of all configured Gemini cookie accounts

post.description: Injects a new __Secure-1PSID and __Secure-1PSIDTS for load balancing and rotation
post.summary: Add or Update a Cookie Account

post.description: Sweeps all accounts and performs bot clearance on those with errors

delete.description: Removes an account from the Rotation pool

post.description: Manually triggers the Rod browser to perform "hãy trả lời ok" interaction
Forces an immediate check or chat generation on the designated account

put.description: Dynamically updates runtime configs like logging and chat deletion

post.description: Manually triggers the discovery service to find and learn new AI guest platforms

get.description: Returns the list of discovered and valid guest chat platforms

put.description: Enable or disable a discovered guest platform

delete.description: Removes a discovered guest platform from the system

post.description: Manually disable a discovered guest platform to skip discovery/use
Manually re-enable a disabled guest platform
Send 'hello' to a guest platform to verify it's working
Resets learned structure for guest platforms and initiates re-learning

parameters.description: Specific Platform ID (optional, omit for ALL)
parameters.name: id

post.description: Resets the GJSON extraction paths to default and triggers healing
Manually triggers the self-healing process to find new GJSON paths

get.description: Returns the current GJSON schema and healing status

post.description: Sends a message to the Claude model
Estimates the number of tokens for a request

get.description: Returns a list of available Claude models
Get details of a specific Claude model

post.description: Performs deep research on a topic using Gemini, searching the web and synthesizing a comprehensive report. This is a blocking call that returns only when research is complete (may take several minutes).
Start a deep research task. Set stream=true for realtime SSE progress, or omit for background polling.
Streams deep research progress in real-time using Server-Sent Events (SSE).

200.description: SSE stream of DeepResearchStreamEvent JSON objects

get.description: Returns the current status and result of a background research task.
Returns a list of models supported by the Gemini API

post.description: Generates content using the Gemini model
Streams generated content using the Gemini model

get.description: Returns the health status of the service. Used by Docker/K8s/cloud platforms to monitor the service.
Returns a list of tools registered in the MCP server. Use this to verify MCP is active.

post.description: Generates a completion for the chat message
Creates an image given a prompt

get.description: Returns a list of models supported by the OpenAI-compatible API

post.description: Alias for chat completions for specific external integration requirements

max_sources.description: MaxSources maximum number of web sources to consult (optional)

model.description: Model to use (optional, defaults to best available)

query.description: Query is the research topic or question

completed_at.description: CompletedAt timestamp (Unix seconds), 0 if not completed

duration_ms.description: DurationMs total research duration in milliseconds

summary.description: Summary is the synthesized research report

background.description: Background if true the task runs asynchronously (always true for this endpoint)

input.description: Input is the research query / topic

max_sources.description: MaxSources max number of web sources to consult

stream.description: Stream if true the server returns an SSE stream of InteractionResponse events

text.description: Text is the research report text

completed_at.description: CompletedAt Unix timestamp (0 if not yet completed)

duration_ms.description: DurationMs total research duration in milliseconds

outputs.description: Outputs list of output items (non-empty when completed)

snippet.description: Snippet relevant excerpt from the source

description.description: Description of what this step did

query.description: Query used in this step (for search steps)
